notes: Incident only for critical nav gaps, regressions, hard budget, or integrity FAIL.
Small GAPs and doc cleanups prefer TICKET; medium/large GAPs remain PROJECT.
Script budget routes docs/tests/tooling to TICKET, core code to PROJECT.
Manual requests map to ROADMAP/PROJECT/TICKET based on kind and core-change constraints.
Release signals map to TICKET/PROJECT/ROADMAP based on dirty tree, publish block, and channel.
